chapter_title.en: Chapter 33 – The supplication against the enemy

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/179)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/179)
text: كُنْتُ عِنْدَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ لَهُ الْعَلَاءُ بْنُ كَامِلٍ إِنَّ فُلَاناً يَفْعَلُ بِي وَ يَفْعَلُ فَإِنْ رَأَيْتَ أَنْ تَدْعُوَ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فَقَالَ هَذَا ضَعْفٌ بِكَ قُلِ.
اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ تَكْفِي مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ وَ لَا يَكْفِي مِنْكَ شَيْ‏ءٌ فَاكْفِنِي أَمْرَ فُلَانٍ بِمَ شِئْتَ وَ كَيْفَ شِئْتَ وَ مِنْ حَيْثُ شِئْتَ وَ أَنَّى شِئْتَ

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad Al Kufy, from Ali Bin Al Hassan Al Taymi, from Ali Bin Asbaat, from Yaqoub Bin Salim who said,

‘I was in the presence of Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, and Al-A’ala Bin Kamil said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘So and so goes against me, and goes against me. So if you<sup>asws</sup> view proper, you<sup>asws</sup> could supplicate to Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This is weakness with you. Say,

‘O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! You<sup>azwj</sup> Suffice me from everything and nothing can suffice from You<sup>azwj</sup>, therefore Suffice me with the matter of so and so with whatever You<sup>azwj</sup> so Desire to, and from wherever You<sup>azwj</sup> so Desire to, and whenever You<sup>azwj</sup> so Desire to’’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ahmad ibn Muhammad al-Kufi has narrated from Ali ibn al-Hassan al-Taymi from Ali ibn Asbat from Ya’qub ibn Salim who has said the following: “Once I was in the presence of abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) and al-‘Ala’ ibn Kamil said to him, ‘So and so acts against me again and again, if you consider it proper, pray to Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy.’ The Imam said, ‘This is more than enough for you. Say, “O Lord, You are sufficient for everything and nothing is sufficient for You. Suffice me in the matters of so and so with whatever You wish, in whatever way You wish, from wherever You wish and whenever You wish.’”
